# requirements-dev.txt  (RECOMMENDED — generated by DEPENDENCY_AUDIT.md)
#
# Local development / tooling only — NOT required to run or deploy the app.
#
# Install (with core):  pip install -r requirements-core.txt -r requirements-dev.txt

# Developer utilities (shell_plus, runserver_plus, model graphs, etc.).
# PROOF: django_extensions is NOT in settings.INSTALLED_APPS and has 0 imports in backend/**.py,
# so it is purely an optional dev convenience. Add it to INSTALLED_APPS locally if you use it.
django-extensions==4.1
